text: The intent of this Exhibit is to provide further clarification of GS Construction Mountain, LLC's General Project Requirements for the Project and is meant to complement the Subcontract Agreement. Where any paragraph or subparagraph in the Subcontract Agreement or Exhibit C, Project Manual (the 'GS Construction Mountain, LLC Project Manual'), is complemented by one of the following paragraphs, the provisions of such paragraph or subparagraph shall remain in effect and the supplemental conditions shall be considered as added thereto.
